gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/228)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (19/228)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) يَكُونُ لِي عَلَى الرَّجُلِ دَرَاهِمُ فَيَقُولُ أَخِّرْنِي بِهَا وَ أَنَا أُرْبِحُكَ فَأَبِيعُهُ جُبَّةً تُقَوَّمُ عَلَيَّ بِأَلْفِ دِرْهَمٍ بِعَشَرَةِ آلَافِ دِرْهَمٍ أَوْ قَالَ بِعِشْرِينَ أَلْفاً وَ أُؤَخِّرُهُ بِالْمَالِ قَالَ لَا بَأْسَ.

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Muhammad Bin Is’haq Bin Ammar who said,

‘I said to Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup>, ‘There happens to be some Dirhams for me upon the man, so he is saying, ‘Delay it (payment) with it and I shall profit you. So I sold him a garment which stood upon me with a thousand Dirhms, for ten thousand Dirhams’, or said, ‘for twenty thousand Dirhams’, and I delay the wealth for him’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘There is no problem’.
en.sarwar: 11. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Muhammad ibn Ishaq ibn ‘Ammar who has said the following: “I once asked abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the case of a man who owes me a certain amount of dirham and says to me, ‘Extend the payback time and I will give you profit’. I then sell to him a gown worth a thousand dirham for ten thousand dirhams - or that he said, twenty thousand dirhams - and extend the payback time. He (the Imam) said, ‘It is not unlawful.’”
